label: Transparent onyx bands motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Onyx transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a polished onyx bands motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete mineral subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A single polished slice of natural banded onyx deposit, glossy black and ivory-white parallel bands, sharp fractured mineral edge, subtle translucent gray strata, mirror-polished face, precise high-contrast stone pattern. Geological mineral accuracy, sharp portfolio-system identity, no jewelry setting.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include full polished slice and natural rim without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no marble slab countertop, no zebra animal pattern, no gemstone ring, no hand, no cave landscape, no text, no watermark, no loose stones, no colored agate, no brown or gold dominance.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Onyx light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Onyx", derived from polished black-and-white banded onyx in a banded mineral deposit. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible sharp portfolio UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, preferred 3840x2160 feel.
Required visible sections: Morphous Onyx, Onyx Bands, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Portfolio Grid, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from glossy black onyx, ivory-white bands, smoke-gray translucent strata, polished highlights, graphite mineral edges, and crisp layered band lines. The board must read as onyx mineral bands, not zebra animal pattern, marble countertop, or generic monochrome SaaS.
Palette names to show: Porcelain Field #f7f4ef, Ink Vein #0f1114, Polished Onyx #181b20, Milk Band #f1ede4, Smoke Strata #9aa0a3, Graphite Edge #34383d, Silver Sheen #d8d8d2, Deep Deposit #050608, Fine Crack #6d7277.
Typography: sharp English portfolio/product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, project cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, portfolio thumbnails, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: sharp portfolio system, 8px radius or less, porcelain surfaces, polished-black primary actions, smoke-gray panels, crisp black borders, ivory band highlights, precise editorial grid, thin layered dividers, subtle glossy onyx texture, high contrast but refined.
Constraints: no zebra animals, no marble kitchen countertop, no gold luxury palette, no colorful gradients, no saturated accent colors, no pure decorative orb backgrounds, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Onyx", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Onyx dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Onyx". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode and remain derived from polished black-and-white banded onyx in a banded mineral deposit.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, preferred 3840x2160 feel.
Required visible sections: Morphous Onyx, Onyx Bands, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Portfolio Grid, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve glossy black onyx surfaces, ivory band text, smoke-gray strata, polished highlights, graphite mineral edges, crisp layered band dividers, and sharp portfolio spacing. The board must read as onyx mineral bands, not zebra animal pattern, marble countertop, or generic monochrome SaaS.
Palette names to show: Deep Deposit #050608, Porcelain Field #f7f4ef, Polished Onyx #181b20, Ink Vein #0f1114, Graphite Edge #34383d, Smoke Strata #9aa0a3, Milk Band #f1ede4, Silver Sheen #d8d8d2, Fine Crack #6d7277.
Typography: sharp English portfolio/product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, project cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, portfolio thumbnails, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep-deposit dark background, polished-onyx cards, porcelain foreground text, milk-band primary actions, smoke-gray muted panels, graphite borders, silver-sheen focus rings, crisp onyx-band separators, subtle glossy mineral texture, restrained high contrast, 8px radius or less.
Constraints: no zebra animals, no marble kitchen countertop, no gold luxury palette, no colorful gradients, no neon glow, no pure black flat-only screen, no decorative orb backgrounds, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Onyx", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
